title: Legacy Procurement Canonical Schema
description: Canonical, snake_case JSON Schema for the Legacy Procurement system. Designed to auto-generate a valid GraphQL SDL subgraph via x-graphql-* hints without changing the structure. This schema defines a root AssistRecord entity with associated metadata and Legacy Procurement-specific domain fields.

legacy_procurement_record.description: Fetch a single Legacy Procurement record by IA PIID or unique ID

ia_piid_or_unique_id.description: Interagency agreement PIID or the Legacy Procurement unique identifier

source_record_id.description: Optional source record identifier for disambiguation

legacy_procurement_records.description: Return a list of Legacy Procurement records (non-paginated)

legacy_procurement_record.description: Root Legacy Procurement entity record combining system metadata and Legacy Procurement-specific data.

system_metadata.description: System-level metadata for lineage, versioning, and ingestion.

ia_piid_or_unique_id.description: Convenience mirror of acquisition_data.ia_piid_or_unique_id for federated lookups.

system_metadata.description: Metadata describing the source system, identifiers, and lifecycle timestamps.

source_record_id.description: Primary identifier of the record within Legacy Procurement

schema_version.description: Version of the canonical Legacy Procurement schema used to produce this record

ingested_at.description: Timestamp when this record was ingested into the data fabric

last_modified.description: Timestamp when this record was last modified in its source

legacy_procurement_specific_data.description: Container for Legacy Procurement-specific data slices.

acquisition_data.description: Acquisition-related data coming from Legacy Procurement.

client_data.description: Client organization data associated with the Legacy Procurement record.

award_data.description: Award-related metadata specific to Legacy Procurement.

legacy_procurement_acquisition_data.description: Acquisition data including agreement identifiers and acquisition nature.

ia_piid_or_unique_id.description: Interagency agreement PIID or unique identifier within Legacy Procurement

nature_of_acquisition.description: Nature of acquisition (taxonomy specific to Legacy Procurement)

legacy_procurement_client_data.description: Client organization identity and related information.

legacy_procurement_office_address.description: Address structure for client organizations in Legacy Procurement.

legacy_procurement_award_data.description: Award-related settings and timelines within Legacy Procurement.

type_of_idc.description: Type of indefinite delivery contract (if applicable)

period_of_performance.description: Start and end dates for a period of performance.

x-update-note: Initial canonical Legacy Procurement schema with x-graphql hints for auto-generating a subgraph SDL.
